message.content:
Here is a detailed summary of all build tool configurations found in this repository.

---

## Build Tool Configuration Summary

### Repository Overview

This repository (`/Users/woojin/swpp`) contains two major components:
1. **`llvm-project/`** -- The upstream LLVM 22.1.0 source tree
2. **`swpp202601-team19/`** -- A custom SWPP compiler project (a course project that converts LLVM IR to SWPP assembly)
3. **`swpp202601/`** -- The course meta-repository (specifications, not build-related)
4. **Top-level scripts** -- Infrastructure scripts for LLVM installation and benchmarking

---

### 1. CMake Build System (Primary Build Tool)

The entire project uses **CMake** with **Ninja** as the generator. This is the dominant build system across both LLVM and the custom SWPP compiler.

#### 1.1 SWPP Compiler CMakeLists.txt Files

| File | Purpose |
|---|---|
| `/Users/woojin/swpp/swpp202601-team19/CMakeLists.txt` | **Root CMake**: project `swpp-compiler` v2026.1.1, C++23, Doxygen integration, `add_subdirectory(src)` and `add_subdirectory(test)`, `enable_testing()` |
| `/Users/woojin/swpp/swpp202601-team19/src/CMakeLists.txt` | **Source root**: Finds LLVM via `find_package(LLVM REQUIRED CONFIG)`, sets C++23 standard, builds `SComp` library, `swpp-compiler` executable, adds `-Wno-deprecated`, exports compile commands, links against LLVM components (passes, analysis, irreader) |
| `/Users/woojin/swpp/swpp202601-team19/src/lib/CMakeLists.txt` | **Lib root**: Defines 3 libraries: `SCPrintIR` (LLVM core/support/transformutils), `SCOpt` (LLVM analysis/passes/scalaropts/transformutils), `SCBackend` (LLVM Analysis/CodeGen/MC/Target/SelectionDAG/GlobalISel/etc. + SWPP backend targets) |
| `/Users/woojin/swpp/swpp202601-team19/src/lib/opt/CMakeLists.txt` | **Optimization passes**: Uses `add_llvm_pass_plugin()` to create `SWPPOptPlugin.so` / `.dylib`. Defines 19 optimization pass targets as OBJECT libraries via custom `add_opt_pass()` function |
| `/Users/woojin/swpp/swpp202601-team19/src/lib/backend/CMakeLists.txt` | **Backend passes**: Defines 9 backend pass OBJECT libraries (calloc elim, const expr elim, GEP elim, GV elim, sext elim, trunc adjust, MIR translator, MIR printer, const copy elim) |
| `/Users/woojin/swpp/swpp202601-team19/src/lib/backend/SWPP/CMakeLists.txt` | **SWPP target backend**: Uses LLVM TableGen to generate register info from `SWPP.td`. Defines 8 SWPP machine target OBJECT libraries (FrameLowering, TargetLowering, RegisterInfo, InstrInfo, Subtarget, TargetMachine, TargetInfo, MCTargetDesc) |
| `/Users/woojin/swpp/swpp202601-team19/test/CMakeLists.txt` | **Test configuration**: Finds `opt` and `FileCheck` from LLVM tools. Auto-discovers `*.ll` test files and registers them as CTest FileCheck tests. Optional benchmark integration tests via `SWPP_ENABLE_BENCHMARK_TESTS` option |

#### 1.2 SWPP CMake Test Runner

| File | Purpose |
|---|---|
| `/Users/woojin/swpp/swpp202601-team19/test/run_filecheck.cmake` | CMake script mode test runner: Invokes `opt -load-pass-plugin=SWPPOptPlugin.so -passes=swpp-opt` on `.ll` inputs, then runs `FileCheck` validation |

#### 1.3 LLVM CMake Configuration

| File | Purpose |
|---|---|
| `/Users/woojin/swpp/llvm-project/llvm/CMakePresets.json` | CMake Presets v6 for LLVM build configuration. Defines hidden preset fragments for: shared libs, build tests, assertions, clang project, clang-tools-extra, LTO, compile commands export, no-build-testing, x86 target, ASAN sanitizer |

The LLVM project itself contains **hundreds** of `CMakeLists.txt` and `.cmake` files (too many to enumerate individually -- 100+ CMakeLists.txt and 100+ .cmake files were found in the first page of results alone). These are standard LLVM upstream build files.

---

### 2. Shell Build Scripts

| File | Purpose |
|---|---|
| `/Users/woojin/swpp/swpp202601-team19/compile.sh` | **Main build script**: Auto-detects LLVM installation at `$LLVM_ROOT` (default `/opt/llvm-22.1.0`), configures libc++ linkage if LLVM was built with it, handles stale CMake cache detection, runs `cmake -S . -GNinja -Bbuild` + `cmake --build build` |
| `/Users/woojin/swpp/swpp202601-team19/format-all.sh` | **Code formatter**: Finds `clang-format` from `$LLVM_ROOT/bin/clang-format`, formats all `.h`/`.cpp` under `src/` and `test/` using the LLVM style from `.clang-format`. Supports `--check` mode for CI dry-run |
| `/Users/woojin/swpp/swpp202601-team19/install-alive2.sh` | **Alive2 verification tool installer**: Installs re2c via brew, clones and builds Z3 4.16.0, clones and builds Alive2 (formal verification for LLVM optimizations) against the LLVM installation |
| `/Users/woojin/swpp/install-llvm.sh` | **LLVM installer**: Two-phase build: (1) builds clang/lld with compiler-rt/libcxx/libcxxabi/libunwind runtimes, (2) rebuilds full LLVM with clang/lldb/lld using libc++ |
| `/Users/woojin/swpp/bench_sprint1.sh` | **Benchmark runner**: Iterates through Sprint 1 PR commits, builds `swpp-compiler` at each commit using `compile.sh`, runs benchmarks via `run_benchmarks.py`, generates markdown comparison summary |

---

### 3. Clang-Format Configuration

| File | Purpose |
|---|---|
| `/Users/woojin/swpp/swpp202601-team19/.clang-format` | **Project clang-format config**: Based on LLVM style, C++ language, 80-column limit, 2-space indent, attach braces, right-aligned pointers, case-sensitive include sorting, Latest C++ standard |

The LLVM project also has **52 `.clang-format` files** in various subdirectories, all following LLVM coding conventions.

---

### 4. Clang-Tidy Configuration

Found **65+ `.clang-tidy` files** across the LLVM project tree (e.g., `/Users/woojin/swpp/llvm-project/.clang-tidy`, `/Users/woojin/swpp/llvm-project/llvm/.clang-tidy`, `/Users/woojin/swpp/llvm-project/clang/.clang-tidy`, etc.). These are standard LLVM linting configurations. Notably, the SWPP team project does **not** have its own `.clang-tidy`.

---

### 5. EditorConfig

| File | Purpose |
|---|---|
| `/Users/woojin/swpp/llvm-project/lldb/tools/lldb-dap/.editorconfig` | EditorConfig for the LLDB DAP VS Code extension only (not project-wide) |

---

### 6. TypeScript/VS Code Extension Configs

| File | Purpose |
|---|---|
| `/Users/woojin/swpp/llvm-project/llvm/utils/vscode/llvm/package.json` | VS Code extension for LLVM |
| `/Users/woojin/swpp/llvm-project/mlir/utils/vscode/package.json` | VS Code extension for MLIR |
| `/Users/woojin/swpp/llvm-project/mlir/utils/tree-sitter-mlir/package.json` | Tree-sitter grammar for MLIR |
| `/Users/woojin/swpp/llvm-project/lldb/tools/lldb-dap/extension/package.json` | LLDB Debug Adapter Protocol extension |

These are upstream LLVM tooling, not the SWPP project's configs.

---

### 7. TypeScript Configs

| File | Purpose |
|---|---|
| `/Users/woojin/swpp/llvm-project/llvm/utils/vscode/llvm/tsconfig.json` | TypeScript config for LLVM VS Code extension |
| `/Users/woojin/swpp/llvm-project/mlir/utils/vscode/tsconfig.json` | TypeScript config for MLIR VS Code extension |
| `/Users/woojin/swpp/llvm-project/lldb/tools/lldb-dap/extension/tsconfig.json` | TypeScript config for LLDB DAP extension |
| `/Users/woojin/swpp/llvm-project/lldb/tools/lldb-dap/extension/src/webview/tsconfig.json` | TypeScript config for LLDB DAP webview |

---

### 8. Docker / Containerization

| File | Purpose |
|---|---|
| `/Users/woojin/swpp/llvm-project/clang/utils/analyzer/Dockerfile` | Docker image for Clang Static Analyzer |
| `/Users/woojin/swpp/llvm-project/bolt/utils/docker-tests/Dockerfile` | Docker image for BOLT testing |
| `/Users/woojin/swpp/llvm-project/bolt/utils/docker/Dockerfile` | Docker image for BOLT |
| `/Users/woojin/swpp/llvm-project/libc/utils/buildbot/Dockerfile` | Docker image for libc buildbot |
| `/Users/woojin/swpp/llvm-project/libcxx/utils/ci/vendor/android/Dockerfile.emulator` | Docker image for Android libcxx CI |
| `/Users/woojin/swpp/llvm-project/llvm/utils/docker/debian12/Dockerfile` | Docker image for Debian 12 LLVM build |
| `/Users/woojin/swpp/llvm-project/llvm/utils/docker/example/Dockerfile` | Example Docker image for LLVM |
| `/Users/woojin/swpp/llvm-project/llvm/utils/docker/nvidia-cuda/Dockerfile` | Docker image for CUDA LLVM build |
| `/Users/woojin/swpp/llvm-project/polly/lib/External/isl/imath/tests/linux/Dockerfile` | Docker image for ISL imath testing |
| `/Users/woojin/swpp/llvm-project/libcxx/utils/ci/docker/docker-compose.yml` | Docker Compose for libcxx CI |

The SWPP team project itself references Docker in its `.gitignore` (`build-docker/`) and CLAUDE.md Pre-PR checklist, but has **no Dockerfile or docker-compose** in its repository.

---

### 9. Makefiles

Found **100+ Makefiles** in the LLVM project tree, primarily in:
- `/Users/woojin/swpp/llvm-project/lldb/test/API/` -- dozens of test Makefiles
- `/Users/woojin/swpp/llvm-project/lldb/packages/Python/lldbsuite/test/make/Makefile.rules` -- shared LLDB test rules
- `/Users/woojin/swpp/llvm-project/lldb/examples/` -- example Makefiles
- `/Users/woojin/swpp/llvm-project/clang/utils/ABITest/` -- ABI test Makefiles
- `/Users/woojin/swpp/llvm-project/polly/lib/External/isl/imath/` -- ISL library Makefiles
- `/Users/woojin/swpp/llvm-project/libc/AOR_v20.02/Makefile` -- Arm Optimized Routines Makefile

The SWPP team project has **no Makefiles** -- it uses CMake exclusively.

---

### 10. Doxygen Configuration

| File | Purpose |
|---|---|
| `/Users/woojin/swpp/swpp202601-team19/Doxyfile.in` | **Doxygen template**: CMake-configured Doxyfile that substitutes `@CMAKE_PROJECT_NAME@`, `@CMAKE_PROJECT_VERSION@`, and `@CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR@`. Input set to `src/` directory, recursive, generates HTML docs to `docs/` |

---

### 11. Git Ignore

| File | Purpose |
|---|---|
| `/Users/woojin/swpp/swpp202601-team19/.gitignore` | Ignores: `.vscode`, `.cache`, `.DS_Store`, `build/`, `build-docker/`, `docs`, `__pycache__/`, `*.ll` (except test/*.ll), `*.s`, `*.inc`, `tmp-swpp-bench/` |
| `/Users/woojin/swpp/swpp202601/.gitignore` | Ignores: `**/.DS_Store`, `.vscode` |
| `/Users/woojin/swpp/llvm-project/.gitignore` + 30+ subdirectory `.gitignore` files | Standard LLVM gitignore patterns |

---

### 12. CI/CD Configuration

**No CI/CD configuration files were found.** Specifically:
- No `.github/workflows/` directory exists in the SWPP team project
- No `.gitlab-ci.yml`
- No `Jenkinsfile`

The SWPP project's CLAUDE.md references CI ("Must pass CI at time of merge"), suggesting CI may be configured on the GitHub repository settings side (not in the repo files) or may have been removed/not yet added.

---

### 13. Environment / Dot-files

**No `.env` files** were found anywhere in the repository.

---

### 14. TableGen Definition Files (SWPP Target)

| File | Purpose |
|---|---|
| `/Users/woojin/swpp/swpp202601-team19/src/lib/backend/SWPP/SWPP.td` | Main SWPP target definition: `def SWPP : Target {}`, includes `Target.td` and `SWPPRegisterInfo.td` |
| `/Users/woojin/swpp/swpp202601-team19/src/lib/backend/SWPP/SWPPRegisterInfo.td` | SWPP register info TableGen definitions |

These are processed by `llvm-tblgen` at build time to generate `SWPPGenRegisterInfo.inc`.

---

### 15. Python Test/Tooling Scripts

| File | Purpose |
|---|---|
| `/Users/woojin/swpp/swpp202601-team19/test/run_benchmarks.py` | Benchmark runner script for the SWPP compiler |
| `/Users/woojin/swpp/swpp202601-team19/test/run_alive2_tv.py` | Alive2 translation validation script |

---

### 16. AI Assistant Configuration

| File | Purpose |
|---|---|
| `/Users/woojin/swpp/swpp202601-team19/CLAUDE.md` | Behavioral guidelines for Claude (AI assistant), containing build/test commands, cost model facts, team assignments, PR checklist |
| `/Users/woojin/swpp/swpp202601-team19/.claude/settings.local.json` | Claude permissions config: allows specific bash commands (build, benchmark, git checkout) and read access to benchmark directories |

---

### 17. Notable ABSENCES

The following common build tool config files were **not found** anywhere in the repository:

- **webpack.config.*** -- Not a JavaScript/Node.js project
- **vite.config.*** -- Not a Vite project
- **rollup.config.*** -- Not a Rollup project
- **esbuild*** -- Not using esbuild
- **babel.config.*** / **.babelrc** -- Not a Babel/JavaScript project
- **postcss.config.*** -- Not using PostCSS
- **tailwind.config.*** -- Not using Tailwind CSS
- **next.config.*** / **nuxt.config.*** -- Not a Next.js/Nuxt.js project
- **.env*** -- No environment variable files
- **CMakeCache.txt** -- Not committed (in `.gitignore` under `build/`)
- **CMakeUserPresets.json** -- Not committed

---

### Summary Table

| Category | Count | Key Files |
|---|---|---|
| CMakeLists.txt (SWPP) | 7 | Root, src, lib, opt, backend, SWPP, test |
| CMakeLists.txt (LLVM) | 100+ | Throughout llvm-project tree |
| .cmake files | 100+ | LLVM cmake modules, SWPP test runner |
| CMakePresets.json | 1 | LLVM upstream |
| Shell scripts | 5 | compile.sh, format-all.sh, install-alive2.sh, install-llvm.sh, bench_sprint1.sh |
| .clang-format | 1 (SWPP) + 52 (LLVM) | LLVM-based C++ style |
| .clang-tidy | 65+ | LLVM project only |
| tsconfig.json | 4 | LLVM VS Code extensions |
| package.json | 4 | LLVM VS Code extensions |
| Dockerfile | 9 | LLVM CI utilities |
| docker-compose.yml | 1 | LLVM libcxx CI |
| Makefile | 100+ | LLDB tests, ISL, libc |
| Doxyfile.in | 1 | SWPP project documentation |
| TableGen (.td) | 2 | SWPP target & register defs |
| .gitignore | 3 (main) + 30+ (LLVM subdirs) | Standard patterns |
| .editorconfig | 1 | LLDB DAP only |
| CLAUDE.md | 1 | AI assistant guidelines |
| .claude/settings.local.json | 1 | AI permissions |
| Python scripts | 2 | Benchmark & alive2 runners |
